_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

clinical_thresholds.note: Pop-up scenario in TMS and PPD/CPD checklist

preauth.label: Clinical notes with indications and planned line of management

ppd_preauth.q: Did X ray (Chest) show any abnormality?
Was Wheezing in chest mentioned in the clinical notes?

cpd_claim.q: Did X ray (Chest) show any abnormality?
Is presence of wheezing sound mentioned in the clinical notes?
Was the patient treated with bronchodilators?

common_queries: Clinical notes missing or incomplete for pre-authorization or claim
X-ray Chest not provided or does not show any abnormality
Wheezing sound not documented in clinical notes
History of cough not reported as more than 18 days
Patient not treated with bronchodilators at claim stage
CBC or Discharge Summary missing at claim stage

additional_information.icd_10_code_uncertain: The document lists '309-318; 300-06; 340' which appear to be non-standard or outdated ICD-9 codes rather than ICD-10 codes, despite being labeled ICD-10. Not extracting values that do not conform to expected ICD-10 format.
additional_information.comorbidity_management: Consider acute exacerbation of asthma/COPD if there is a history of any of these 2 illnesses
referral_criteria: Frank hemoptysis and/or Signs of respiratory failure [listed under in the history and evaluation sections]
Oxygen saturation by pulse oximetry ≤ 92% (patients ≤50 yrs) OR <90% (patients >50 yrs)
